steps.title: Use the result clue
steps.content: The exchange gives companies regulatory oversight, and knowing this lets investors focus on business opportunities instead of bureaucratic worries. The blank must describe reducing those worries, not increasing or simply communicating them.

steps.title: Choose the calming word
steps.content: Choice A would intensify the worries. Choice B means name or appoint, and Choice C means communicate; neither means reduce anxiety. The word that means calm or soothe worries fits the sentence's logic. The answer is D.
